hero.description: rough ideas → shipped products. a team of one.

receipt.years: years shipping interactives, from first commit to today.

about.title: how i work.
about.bio: fullstack, system design, ai engineering — three things i practice on every product i build. seven years end-to-end across data viz, real-time systems, ai tooling, and sales funnels — with a method that compounds. brazilian, based in porto alegre.

tactics.title: context budgets.
tactics.body: i treat the model's context window as a first-class cost, not a free resource — every dispatch and plan is sized against it before the work starts.

tactics.title: skills over prompts.
tactics.body: repeated decisions get codified into reusable skills with explicit guardrails — that's how i keep hallucinations out of shipped code.

tactics.title: retros that compound.
tactics.body: every non-trivial task ends with a small retrospective — the lesson gets written back into the skill library, so the next attempt is sharper, not the same.

tactics.title: automation by snapshot.
tactics.body: flows i run more than twice get captured as skills — for example, the portfolio snapshot skill walks a repo, boots the frontend, mocks dead backends inline, and emits a typed bundle another ai can ingest: metadata, a technical brief, and an asymmetric set of desktop/mobile screenshots sized for downstream mockup templates.
